narrative:
Brookville City has 4,303 registered voters, with 54.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 33.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 20.9 percentage points.
